direction.audience_fit: Campaign strategies, marketing proposals, go-to-market plans, launch plans and business cases that need a clean modern pitch.

typography.heading: Aptos Display, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.mono: SF Mono, Cascadia Code, Consolas, monospace

patterns.title_slide: Wide cool visual band or slab with a short lavender title and small section tag.
patterns.section_slide: Short assertion with an image rail, used to reset from strategy to execution.
patterns.comparison_slide: Numbered challenge rows or two-column audience/competitor contrast.
patterns.table_slide: Budget or channel table with a chart plus a numbered allocation ladder.
patterns.code_slide: Not a code-first style; use a restrained white or charcoal artifact block only when necessary.
patterns.architecture_slide: Campaign path, funnel, timeline or workflow shown as a simple sequence with few nodes.

accessibility: KPI labels include units and periods
status is not communicated by color only

decisions.decision: Add a cool light campaign style based on user-provided Campaign Strategy references.
decisions.rationale: The reference deck adds a distinct proposal pattern: challenge rows, audience insight, milestone timeline, budget allocation, persona, KPI strip and ask rows.
